subject: [OOM] Add comments for importCustomCerts in blueprints-processor
commit_message:
[OOM] Add comments for importCustomCerts in blueprints-processor

Comments explain how to enable import Custom Certificates.
By default, importCustomCerts is disabled.

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3356
Signed-off-by: Abdelmuhaimen Seaudi <abdelmuhaimen.seaudi@orange.com>
Change-Id: I42264c465861786dfb38dda8c94abbe6c6a9c56d

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3379/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3379/ )

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 96 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: Some commments to explain how to enable import Custom Certificates, which is disabled by default ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/3379/ )
